About Me

Turning Numbers Into Decisions

Hi, I'm a passionate Power BI Developer & Data Analyst with 2 years of hands-on experience building dashboards, data models, and BI solutions that help teams understand their data at a glance.

I specialize in DAX, Power Query, data modeling, and creating reports that don't just look good — they drive measurable outcomes for businesses.

Power BI & DAX90%
Data Modeling85%

Excel & Analytics88%
How I Work

My Process, Step by Step

From discovery to delivery — turning data chaos into clarity.

🎯

I Hear You

We start with a free discovery call. I listen to your goals, pain points, and desired outcomes to fully understand what you need.

🗺️

I Share a Roadmap

Based on your needs, I craft an actionable plan with the “why” behind every step so you know exactly what to expect.

🚀

We Build Together

Once aligned, I build your solution — scalable dashboards, clean data models, and user-friendly reports focused on real results.

FAQ

Common Questions

I've built dashboards for property, retail, HR, e-commerce, finance, and healthcare — delivering KPI trackers, financial packs, sales reports, and operational dashboards.

Absolutely. I work closely with your team to define the right KPIs, translate them into DAX, and design actionable visuals that highlight what matters most to your business.

SQL databases, Excel, SharePoint, APIs, Google Sheets, Azure, and many more — wherever your data lives, I can pull it in and shape it for reporting.

Most dashboards take 1–2 weeks. Timelines vary based on data complexity, but I always prioritize speed without compromising quality.

Yes! Every delivery includes a full walkthrough so your team can use, filter, and interpret the reports confidently on their own.
